checks.name: ros_topics
command: source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash >/dev/null 2>&1; source ~/zed_ws/install/setup.bash >/dev/null 2>&1; ros2 topic list 2>/dev/null | grep '^/zed' || true

checks.name: pyzed_probe
command: import pyzed.sl as sl; cam=sl.Camera(); init=sl.InitParameters(); init.camera_resolution=sl.RESOLUTION.HD720; init.camera_fps=15; init.depth_mode=sl.DEPTH_MODE.NONE; print(cam.open(init))
